hero.title: Play Harmonium Online
hero.description: A browser-based harmonium tool with keyboard shortcuts, touch controls, Sargam labels, and a lightweight SaaS foundation for future premium features.

features.title: Built for Practice-First Search Traffic
features.description: This fallback landing configuration keeps the product focused on fast play, clear note labels, and lightweight growth validation.

items.title: Instant Play
items.description: Users should be able to start pressing notes immediately without a login wall.

items.title: Useful Controls
items.description: Octave, transpose, and label toggles matter more than generic SaaS hero copy.

items.title: SEO Support
items.description: The tool is supported by blog content and explanatory sections so it can rank as a real page.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Answering intent clearly helps both users and search engines.

items.question: Do I need to download anything?
items.answer: No. The goal is to keep the harmonium fully usable in the browser.

items.question: Do I need an account first?
items.answer: No. The core playing experience should remain open, while premium features can be added later.

items.question: Why show Sargam and western labels?
items.answer: Because learners come from different notation systems, and the same page should support both.

cta.title: Open the Tool and Start Practicing
cta.description: Use the homepage instrument first, then expand into content and premium features once demand is proven.
